name: silabs-8051-debug
description: Debug adapter for Silicon Laboratories 8051 MCUs via AGDI / EC3 USB Debug Adapter

silabs8051.keilPath.markdownDescription: Path to your Keil installation folder (e.g. `C:\Keil_v5`) or directly to `UV4.exe`. Leave empty to auto-detect from the registry. [Browse…](command:silabs8051.browseKeilPath)

program.description: Path to the Intel HEX file. If omitted, derived automatically from 'uvprojFile' or by searching the workspace.

uvprojFile.description: Path to the Keil µVision project file (.uvproj or .uvprojx). Used to determine the HEX output path and (with buildBeforeDebug) to invoke UV4.exe. If omitted, the workspace is searched automatically.

buildBeforeDebug.description: Run UV4.exe -b to build the project before launching the debug session. Requires Keil µVision to be installed.

buildTarget.description: Keil µVision target name to build (passed as -t <name> to UV4.exe). If omitted, UV4 builds whatever target is currently active in the project's .uvopt file.

noDebug.description: Flash-only mode: program the device without starting a debug session.

noErase.description: Skip the flash-erase pass (program + verify only, faster).

configurationSnippets.label: SiLabs 8051: Flash + Debug
configurationSnippets.description: Build with Keil, flash, and start a live debug session.

configurationSnippets.label: SiLabs 8051: Flash Only
configurationSnippets.description: Erase, program and verify the target without opening a debug session.

configurationSnippets.label: SiLabs 8051: Flash Only (no erase)
configurationSnippets.description: Program and verify only — skip the erase pass.
